purpose: Snapshot before rebuilding project-1 … project-7 in the live site.

paths.public: public/projects/* — only folders that existed under public/projects; project-4/5 had no static asset root
paths.publicProjectCovers: public/project_cover/* — list-cover images referenced by data.ts for project-4,5,6,7
paths.code: code/mdx — full copy of src/components/mdx (shared imports between Project2–6 demos)

reuse.mdxOnly: Restore from content/ + match paths in MDX under public/
reuse.interactiveDemos: Diff or copy files from code/mdx into src/components/mdx; re-register components in src/components/mdx/index.tsx if you add renamed exports
